summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Blueview app - Admin Users, Admin Subcontractors, Owner Portal, and NFC Check-In pages. All pages now connected to real backend APIs. Backend APIs working correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend pages load real data from API. One issue found: Owner Portal cannot load admin accounts due to missing JWT token.

integration_issues.issue: Owner Portal uses password-based auth but calls /api/admin/users which requires JWT token. API returns 403 Forbidden, so admin accounts list is empty (shows 0 COMPANIES, 0 ACTIVE).

passed_tests: Login with credentials rfs2671@gmail.com / Asdddfgh1$ - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows real stats (5 Total Workers, 1 Active Project, 0 On Site Now) - SUCCESS
Dashboard shows Quick Actions and Admin Actions for admin users - SUCCESS
Admin Users page (/admin/users) - loads 2 real users from API (John Electrician, Roy Fishman) - SUCCESS
Admin Users page shows correct role badges (SUBCONTRACTOR, ADMIN) - SUCCESS
Admin Users page has Assign/Edit/Delete buttons - SUCCESS
Admin Subcontractors page (/admin/subcontractors) - loads 1 real subcontractor from API (ABC Electric Inc.) - SUCCESS
Admin Subcontractors page shows contact info (email, phone, trade) - SUCCESS
Owner Portal (/owner) - password login with 'blueview2024' works - SUCCESS
Owner Portal shows Admin Accounts section and Create Admin button - SUCCESS
NFC Check-In page (/nfc?tag=TEST123) - shows error for non-existent tag - SUCCESS
NFC Check-In page shows correct error message 'NFC tag not found or inactive' - SUCCESS
Backend API: GET /api/nfc-tags/TEST123/info - 404 (tag not found - expected)
action_items: Fix Owner Portal: Either create a dedicated /api/owner/admins endpoint that uses owner password auth, OR require user login before accessing Owner Portal, OR store JWT token when user logs in and use it in Owner Portal
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Users page correctly connected to /api/admin/users - loads real data
Admin Subcontractors page correctly connected to /api/admin/subcontractors - loads real data
NFC Check-In page correctly calls /api/nfc-tags/{tag_id}/info - handles errors properly
Owner Portal has authentication design issue - uses password auth but calls JWT-protected APIs
All pages handle empty states and errors gracefully

success_rate.frontend: 90% (Owner Portal admin list not loading due to auth issue)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - using existing data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Users and Subcontractors pages are now connected to real backend APIs and working correctly. Owner Portal has an authentication issue - it uses password-based auth but tries to call JWT-protected APIs, resulting in 403 errors. NFC Check-In page correctly handles non-existent tags. API base URL is https://blueview2-production.up.railway.app

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Owner Portal shows 0 COMPANIES and 0 ACTIVE
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Owner Portal uses its own password-based authentication (OWNER_PASSWORD = 'blueview2024') but calls adminUsersAPI.getAll() which uses apiClient with JWT token interceptor. Since no JWT token is stored (user didn't login via /login page), the API returns 403 Forbidden.
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe console error: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 403'
5. Admin Accounts list is empty, stats show 0
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Either: (1) Create a dedicated /api/owner/admins endpoint that validates owner password instead of JWT, OR (2) Require user to login first before accessing Owner Portal, OR (3) Modify Owner Portal to prompt for user credentials and store JWT token
